per_criterion_scores.internal_note: Commands were somewhat effective but lacked specificity and did not address all critical issues.
The student integrated feedback on fragility but did not fully address weight sorting or simulation assumptions.
The student did not focus on optimizing efficiency or resolving ambiguities in the AI's approach.

justification: The student demonstrated insufficient understanding by failing to optimize efficiency and resolve ambiguities, with only partial integration of feedback and corrective commands.
